description: Top 10 Python packages that directly depend on Tornado, selected by a combination of GitHub stars and PyPI download volume. Each entry has the information needed to clone and run the project's own test suite in an isolated uv-managed environment.
selection_criteria: Declares tornado in install_requires/pyproject.toml (direct, not transitive)

packages.name: streamlit
packages.reason: Streamlit ML/data-app framework, ~35k GitHub stars; uses Tornado for its web server.
packages.notes: setup_extra generates Python protobuf bindings (needed before any streamlit import). Runs a focused subset of the unit tests (full suite needs a built frontend and many extras).

packages.name: bokeh
packages.reason: Bokeh interactive visualization, ~19k stars; Bokeh server is built on Tornado.
packages.test_cmd: uv pip install -q pytest-timeout pytest-asyncio && python -m pytest -o asyncio_mode=auto -W 'ignore::pytest.PytestWarning' tests/unit/bokeh/server/test_tornado__server.py -q
packages.notes: Full bokeh tests require selenium/node; we target the tornado-specific server tests.

packages.name: jupyter_server
packages.reason: Core backend for Jupyter Notebook / JupyterLab; Tornado is its HTTP engine.
packages.test_cmd: python -m pytest tests/test_utils.py tests/test_version.py tests/test_traittypes.py tests/test_serialize.py -x -q
packages.notes: Pure-function tests that don't instantiate a live ServerApp. ServerApp-based tests hit an unrelated jupyter_events>=0.12 schema-version incompat when they load the built-in event schemas.

packages.name: notebook
packages.reason: Classic Jupyter Notebook UI, ~11k stars; transitively pulls Tornado through jupyter_server.

packages.name: jupyterhub
packages.notes: Full suite needs a JS build and a database; we run logic-only tests.

packages.name: distributed
packages.reason: Dask distributed scheduler, ~1.6k stars; communications layer uses Tornado.
packages.test_cmd: uv pip install -q pytest-timeout && python -m pytest -o addopts= distributed/tests/test_versions.py -x -q
packages.notes: Pinning a small test module; full suite is multi-hour.

packages.name: flower
packages.reason: Celery monitoring web UI, ~6.5k stars; Flower is a Tornado application.
packages.notes: Full test suite is small and self-contained.

packages.name: ipykernel
packages.reason: IPython kernel for Jupyter, ~650 stars; uses Tornado via jupyter_client.
packages.notes: Kernel spec tests don't need a running kernel.

packages.name: panel
packages.reason: HoloViz Panel dashboards, ~5k stars; built on Bokeh/Tornado.
packages.notes: Installing the published wheel because the source build runs a full npm/bokeh bundling step. Tests are still run from the checkout.

packages.name: voila
packages.reason: Render Jupyter notebooks as standalone apps, ~5.4k stars; Tornado-based server.
packages.notes: Source build tries to fetch bundled CSS from a URL that 403s in sandboxed envs; install the published wheel and run the test files from the checkout.
